title: 3D Reinforced Armor
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fc1970c7020399a17ff3cf28695360746763c85.png)


## Requirement
To use this pack, [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) is REQUIRED.

## Description
Reinforced armor is an EMF-exclusive texture pack that completely revamps all armor into new, more realistic armor. Reinforced armor accomplishes this with Entity Model Feature's exclusive feature of editing the armor model. Because of this, this pack will not work on Optifine.
